DECLARATION OF JOSEPH F. CHARLES, ESQ. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORUNO, ILEANA A.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-09-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT BLUEPRINT STUDIOS TRENDS INC., MOTION TO COMPEL AMENDED RESPONSES TO REQEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENT SET TWO IS GRANTED TO THE EXTEND THAT THE DOCUMENTS SOUGHT ARE UNDER PLAINTIFF'S CONTROL AND MAY BE PRODUCED BY HER, SAID DOCUMENTS TO BE PRODUCED BY PLAINTIFF BY NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 25, 2013. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS ID DENIED. BOTHE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO ENGAGE IN A MEET AND CONFER AGAINST ON THESE DISCOVERY MATERS BY NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 20, 2013. PLAINTIFF CLAIMS THAT SHE IS OWED UNPAID OVERTIME WAGES, MISSED MEAL AND REST BREAK WAGES AND STATUTORY PENALTIES BECAUSE SHE WAS MISCLASSIFIED BY DEFENDANT AS AN INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR. DEFENDANT HAS UNCONDITIONALLY TENDERED TO PLAINTIFF $12,500.00 WHICH REPERSENTED ALL THE WAGES SHE CLAIMS SHE IS OWED IN THIS MATTER. APPARENTLY, PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN UNWILLING TO SPECIFY AN AMOUNT WHICH SHE NOW CONTINUES TO SEEK FROM DEFENDANT WHICH HAS HINDERED FURTHER SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES THE REQUESTED DOCUMENTS ARE RELEVANT TO DEFENDANT'S DEFENSE AND MUST BE PRODUCED BY PLAINTIFF UNLESS THEY ARE TRULY NOT UNDER HER CONTROL, A MATTER WHICH MUST BE RESOLVED BY THE PARTIES AT THE ORDERED MEET AND CONFER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM ADRIAN A. COLLEY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Compliance With Court Order And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BLUEPRINT STUDIOS TRENDS INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH COURT ORDER AND FOR SANCTIONS.

Appearances: Maya Ohana of Gordon & Rees LLP (415.986.5900) for defendant and moving party; Parviz Darabi of the Law Offices of Parviz Darabi (650.343.5357) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party.

Counsel stipulate to the matter being decided by Judge Pro Tem Thomas Cohen. The matter is argued and the Court takes the matter under submission. Counsel are to meet and confer on the proposed form of order and send it to Judge Pro Tem Cohen via email. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen; Not Reported (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Continued To May-19-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Quash Subpoenas Issued By Deft
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Text Ruling

Mtn To Compel Amended Responses To Req For Production Of Docs Set Two
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Parviz Darabi, Esq. [650.343.5357] appearing for ILEANA A. TORUNO, plaintiff / opposing party; Maya Ohana, Esq. of Gordon & Rees LLP [415.986.5900] appearing for BLUEPRINT STUDIOS, defendant / moving party

Argued,the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BLUEPRINT STUDIOS TRENDS INC., Motion To Compel Amended Responses To Reqest For Production Of Document Set Two is granted to the extend that the documents sought are under plaintiff's control and may be produced by her, said documents to be produced by plaintiff by no later than September 25, 2013. Defendant's request for sanctions id denied. Bothe parties are ordered to engage in a meet and confer against on these discovery maters by no later than September 20, 2013. Plaintiff claims that she is owed unpaid overtime wages, missed meal and rest break wages and statutory penalties because she was misclassified by defendant as an independent contractor. Defendant has unconditionally tendered to plaintiff $12,500.00 which repersented all the wages she claims she is owed in this matter. Apparently, plaintiff has been unwilling to specify an amount which she now continues to seek from defendant which has hindered further settlement discussions. Under the circumstances the requested documents are relevant to defendant's defense and must be produced by plaintiff unless they are truly not under her control, a matter which must be resolved by the parties at the ordered meet and confer. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Adrian A. Colley, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
